target.name: Long Wall
target.founder: Dan Piemont (CEO; ex-SpaceX, ex-Morgan Stanley), Harry O'Hanley (ex-SpaceX, ex-Morgan Stanley)

methods.name: Stage-Progression

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Defense & Security. Range: $1.5B - $7.5B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

private.name: Destinus
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Late Stage), post-money $1.5B

data.narrative:
Long Wall is a late-stage Defense & Security company that has raised $544M to date, founded by Dan Piemont and Harry O'Hanley (both ex-SpaceX, ex-Morgan Stanley). The valuation assessment draws on a comparative universe of 10 peers—2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms including Flock Safety, Shield AI, Anduril Industries, and Destinus.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis, which applies a 1.2x step-up multiplier typical for late-stage advancement, yields $653M. Peer-median analysis across three same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables—Flock Safety ($7.5B Series G), Shield AI ($5.6B Series G), and Destinus ($1.5B late stage)—produces a median valuation of $5.6B, with a range spanning $1.5B to $7.5B. The median peer valuation substantially exceeds the stage-progression result, reflecting the capital intensity and downstream consolidation patterns characteristic of the Defense & Security sector.

The triangulated range is $555M (low) to $6.4B (high), with a median of $3.1B. The wide spread reflects meaningful uncertainty: stage-progression anchors conservatively at the lower bound using only capital history, while peer-median captures sector-specific valuation expansion but with limited comp sample (n=3). Key sensitivities include revenue run-rate, customer concentration, and whether Long Wall's positioning aligns more closely with early-stage Destinus or growth-stage Shield AI within the peer set.
